name: Rueben Brunch Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut rye bread into 3/4 inch cubes.
2. Lightly beat the eggs.
3. Grease a 13 x 9 x 2 inch baking dish and arrange bread cubes on the bottom of the dish.
4. Coarsely shred corned beef with a knife.
5. Layer meat over the bread.
6. Sprinkle cheese evenly over the meat layer.
7. Beat eggs, milk, and black pepper in a bowl until well blended.
8. Pour the egg mixture over the meat and cheese layers.
9. Cover the dish with foil.
10. Refrigerate overnight.
11. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
12. Bake the casserole covered for 45 minutes.
13. Remove the foil and bake uncovered for an additional 10 minutes, or until bubbly and puffed.
